name: techno (minimal) production
text:
Kick, Snare, Clap, Hats 1–2 Percussion Noise layer

Очистка кика EQ → Saturation → (иногда) Trim/Length High Pass: 25–30 Hz Очистка хета

Search queries splice.com: Chopped/stuttered vocals (his signature): vocal chop, vocal stutter, glitch vocal, chopped vox, granular vocal Glitch textures & micro-edits: glitch, granular, clicks, stutter, buffer, idm texture Broken/abstract beats: broken beat, idm drums, wonky, abstract hip hop, and dusty boom bap for the hip-hop bones Warm jazz layers (your teplo side): rhodes, vibraphone, jazz keys, dusty keys, jazz guitar, soul chops The grit: lo-fi, tape, dusty, vinyl, cassette
